name: MoneyGram
description_short: Omaha MoneyGram at 6304 North 99th Street offers check cashing and money transfers.
description_long:
MoneyGram operates at 6304 North 99th Street in Omaha, NE—a standalone location serving the community with extended hours. This Omaha branch is open Monday through Saturday from 8AM to 8PM and Sunday from 10AM to 6PM, making it easy for Omaha residents to access check-cashing services when needed.

The 6304 North 99th Street location provides check cashing, bill payments, and money transfer services. Call +1 402-492-9344 to discuss your specific financial needs or confirm current service offerings at this Omaha branch.

Bring a valid government-issued ID (driver's license, passport, or state ID) when you visit. This North 99th Street location serves Omaha residents seeking accessible check-cashing and money transfer services at convenient hours.
pros: 19 documented locations across Omaha with extended evening hours (many open until 8:00-9:00 PM)
Partnerships with major retailers like Walmart, CVS, and local businesses increase accessibility
Dual online and offline transfer options accommodate different customer preferences
Serves both domestic US transfers and international money sending capabilities
Locations in diverse Omaha neighborhoods including south, west, and north areas
No requirement for bank account to send or receive money transfers
Immediate availability at retail partner locations without needing to travel to dedicated offices
cons: MoneyGram charges transaction fees for money transfers that vary by location and transfer amount
Service quality and staff expertise may vary significantly between different retail agent locations
Limited service details provided on location-search website; specifics on fee structure not disclosed
Domestic bank transfers through traditional banks are typically more cost-effective than MoneyGram services
Reliance on third-party retailers means service availability depends on host business hours and priorities
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts
Individuals needing to send money to family members internationally or domestically
Customers seeking convenient money transfer services during evening or weekend hours
People preferring to complete financial transactions while shopping at retail partners
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked/underbanked consumers and those needing convenient money transfers during extended retail hours, particularly for international remittances. The main caveat is that MoneyGram charges transaction fees making it less cost-effective than traditional bank transfers—the value proposition centers on accessibility and convenience for those without banking alternatives, not economic efficiency.
services: Domestic money transfer within the United States
International money transfer to recipients globally
In-person money transfer at retail agent locations
Cash pickup for money received transfers
meta_description: MoneyGram at 6304 N 99th St, Omaha, NE. Check cashing and money transfers.
